questionHtml:
The length of the side of a cube is 2.0 cm ± 4 %. The mass of the cube is 24.0 g ± 8 %. What is the percentage uncertainty of the density of the cube?

 

A.   ± 2 %

B.   ± 8 %

C.   ± 12 %

D.   ± 20 %

meta.title: The length of the side of a cube is 2.0 cm ± 4 %. The mass of the cube is 24.0 g ± 8 %. What is the percentage uncertainty of the density of the cube? A. ± 2 % B. ± 8 % C. ± 12 % D
